Conference History

2024 International Conference on Intelligent Information Technology (ICIIT 2024)  has been held successfully in Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam (Online+Offline) during February 23-25, 2024.

Publication: ACM Conference Proceedings (ISBN: 979-8-4007-1671-3) (In press)

Group Photo

2023 International Conference on Intelligent Information Technology (ICIIT 2023)  has been held successfully in Da Nang, Vietnam (Online+Offline) during February 24-26, 2023.

Publication: ACM Conference Proceedings (ISBN: 978-1-4503-9961-6) (Click), indexed by Ei Compendex and Scopus

Onsite Photo

Screenshot of Participants

2022 International Conference on Intelligent Information Technology (ICIIT 2022)  has been held successfully in Foshan, China (Online+Offline) during February 25-27, 2022.

Publication: ACM Conference Proceedings (ISBN: 978-1-4503-9617-2), indexed by Ei Compendex and Scopus

Onsite Photo

Screenshot of Participants

2021 International Conference on Intelligent Information Technology (ICIIT 2021)  has been held successfully in Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam (Online) during February 25-28, 2021.

Publication: ACM Conference Proceedings (ISBN: 978-1-4503-8894-8), indexed by Ei Compendex and Scopus

Screenshot of Participants

2020 International Conference on Intelligent Information Technology (ICIIT 2020)  has been held successfully in Hanoi, Vietnam during February 19-22, 2020.

Publication: ACM Conference Proceedings (ISBN: 978-1-4503-7659-4), indexed by Ei Compendex and Scopus

Group Photo

2019 International Conference on Intelligent Information Technology (ICIIT 2019)  has been held successfully in Da Nang, Vietnam during February 20-23, 2019.

Publication: ACM Conference Proceedings (ISBN: 978-1-4503-6633-5), indexed by Ei Compendex and Scopus

Group Photo

2018 International Conference on Intelligent Information Technology (ICIIT 2018)  has been held successfully in Vietnam Academy of Science and Technology, Hanoi, Vietnam during February 26-28, 2018.

 

Publication: ACM Conference Proceedings (ISBN: 978-1-4503-6378-5), indexed by Ei Compendex and Scopus

Group Photo
